description: Style NoteAn all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure your trousers, or act as a styling detail to jazz up your outfit. This canvas belt from ADIDAS is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire.Product DetailsBrownish grey belt with a silver clamp buckleBranding embossed on the buckleMaterial and Care100% polypropyleneWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a brass polisher to maintain buckle shine
